summary: Iteration 21 - LUCCCA Culinary Module Smoke Test Complete. Full cycle verified: invoice â†’ recipe â†’ cost â†’ menu â†’ AI notes â†’ translate to Spanish. Dashboard KPI links navigation working (Revenueâ†’POS, Laborâ†’Schedule, Inventoryâ†’Inventory, Eventsâ†’Echo Events, Forecastâ†’ForecastHub). Culinary module loads ECHO RECIPE PRO interface. Pastry module loads with dark teal sidebar design. Purchasing & Receiving module loads with Dashboard view. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All modules and KPI navigation verified.

issues: Dark teal sidebar design in light mode - this is the module's internal design as noted in context, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard loads on startup with 6 KPI cards visible (Revenue, Labor Cost, Inventory, Events, Workflows, Forecast)
Revenue KPI ($777.15) click opens POS Connector panel - verified via console logs
Labor Cost KPI (36.4%) click opens Schedule panel - verified
Inventory KPI ($2,606) click opens Inventory panel - verified
Events KPI (8 events) click opens Echo Events panel - verified
Forecast KPI (94.2%) click opens ForecastHub panel - verified
Culinary module loads ECHO RECIPE PRO - Research & Development Suite with internal sidebar navigation
Pastry module loads with RECIPES, ADD RECIPE, MENU STUDIO, GALLERY, DISH ASSEMBLY, PASTRY STUDIO sections
Purchasing & Receiving module loads with Dashboard showing Open Orders, Receiving Queue, Monthly Spend, Budget Variance
Backend POST /api/operations/invoice/process processes invoice items correctly
Backend POST /api/operations/recipe creates recipe with ID
Backend POST /api/culinary/notes/generate creates AI server/cook notes (uses Emergent LLM Key)
Backend POST /api/culinary/translate translates notes to Spanish (uses Emergent LLM Key)
Backend POST /api/culinary/menus creates menu with recipe items
Panel navigation bug fixed - no overlay stacking observed
Sidebar collapses after clicking module item (expected behavior)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed ingredients, recipes, and menus for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified full Culinary module smoke test: 1) Invoice processing creates/updates ingredients, 2) Recipe creation with ingredients, 3) Recipe cost calculation, 4) AI notes generation (server and cook notes), 5) Translation to Spanish, 6) Menu creation with recipes. Dashboard KPI navigation verified: Revenueâ†’pos-connector, Laborâ†’schedule, Inventoryâ†’inventory, Eventsâ†’echo-events, Forecastâ†’forecast-hub. All three modules load correctly: Culinary (ECHO RECIPE PRO), Pastry (dark teal sidebar design), Purchasing & Receiving (Dashboard with order metrics). Panel navigation bug was fixed by clearing stale Vite cache. Sidebar collapses after clicking module item.
